examples: These are all in the tester's bailiwick.
The range of the authority or influence of a person, group, or thing; a bailiwick.
The trust is calling for people in the Bailiwick to help search for injured seabirds.
There are three public statues in the Bailiwick, all of which stand in St Peter Port.
Previously unprinted information on German tunnels in the Bailiwick of Guernsey has been released.
